spans.anchor_text: WDC was reevaluating its interest in acquiring sTec, and that WDC was not prepared to move forward with a transaction with sTec at that time
spans.quote_text: On May 31, 2013, a representative of WDC communicated to BofA Merrill Lynch that WDC was reevaluating its interest in acquiring sTec, and that WDC was not prepared to move forward with a transaction with sTec at that time. In addition, WDC discontinued their due diligence efforts with the company at that time. BofA Merrill Lynch then contacted the companys officers and Dr. Daly to report the communication from WDC.

spans.anchor_text: announced in a joint press release the execution of the merger agreement
spans.quote_text: On June 24, 2013, prior to the opening of trading on the U. S. stock exchanges, WDC and sTec announced in a joint press release the execution of the merger agreement.

spans.anchor_text: our board of directors determined that it was in the best interests of the company and its shareholders to confidentially approach strategic buyers

our board of directors determined that it was in the best interests of the company and
its shareholders to confidentially approach strategic buyers that the board believed would be most likely to have interest in a potential acquisition of the company to explore their interest, but to also further conduct a limited confirmatory
exploration of interest of financial buyers.
